zh.lifeSummary: 當Amy Stourton於大約1455年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，她的父親John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton56歲，母親Margery Wadham74歲。她於1467年之前與Sir Edwin Henry Rogers結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1488年之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amy Stourton于大约1455年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓时，她的父亲John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton56岁，母亲Margery Wadham74岁。她于1467年之前与Sir Edwin Henry Rogers结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1488年之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Amy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

variants.name: Aimie
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

variants.name: Aimée
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Amie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Amy  , corresponding in form to the French vocabulary word meaning ‘(female) friend’.

variants.name: Ami
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

en.lifeSummary: When Amy Stourton was born about 1455, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton, was 56 and her mother, Margery Wadham, was 74. She married Sir Edwin Henry Rogers before 1467. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1488, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amy Stourton est née environ 1455, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margery Wadham, avait 74 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edwin Henry Rogers avant 1467. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1488, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amy Stourton um 1455 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton 56 und ihre Mutter Margery Wadham 74. Sie hat vor 1467 Sir Edwin Henry Rogers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1488 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amy Stourton è nata il circa 1455 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Margery Wadham, aveva 74 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edwin Henry Rogers prima del 1467. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1488, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Amy Stourtonが約1455年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父John Stourton 1st Baron Stourtonは56歳，母Margery Wadhamは74歳であった。1467年以前にSir Edwin Henry Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1488年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amy Stourton(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Wadham(은)는 74세였다. 그녀는 1467년 이전 Sir Edwin Henry Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amy Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Margery Wadham, tinha 74 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edwin Henry Rogers antes 1467. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1488, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amy Stourton родилась около 1455 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Wadham, 74. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edwin Henry Rogers перед 1467 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1488 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amy Stourton nació aproximadamente 1455, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Margery Wadham, tenía 74 años. Se casó con Sir Edwin Henry Rogers antes de 1467. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1488, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
